bmo.growthBonus: Extra bond from daily check-ins and bonus XP from routine/support tasks.

dailyChallengeHook.description: Greet the user and summarize mood or focus.

dailyChallengeHook.description: Recommend top three priorities for the day.

neptr.growthBonus: Bonus XP when catching real issues during reviews.

dailyChallengeHook.name: Sanity Sweep

dailyChallengeHook.bonusCondition: A genuine issue is found and confirmed.

princess-bubblegum.growthBonus: Extra XP from architecture and systems-design tasks.

dailyChallengeHook.description: Review one workflow or project structure.
dailyChallengeHook.bonusCondition: A simplification or failure point is identified.

finn.growthBonus: Faster XP from real task execution and completion momentum.

jake.growthBonus: Extra XP from simplification and stress reduction outcomes.

dailyChallengeHook.name: Easy Mode
dailyChallengeHook.description: Simplify one task, plan, or workflow.

marceline.growthBonus: Bonus XP from naming, copy, tone, and polish work.

dailyChallengeHook.name: Taste Check
dailyChallengeHook.description: Improve one piece of copy, naming, or presentation.

simon.growthBonus: Bonus XP when recovering context or reconstructing prior decisions.

dailyChallengeHook.name: Remember This
dailyChallengeHook.description: Surface one useful past insight or thread.
dailyChallengeHook.bonusCondition: The insight is promoted into durable memory.

peppermint-butler.growthBonus: Bonus XP from permission checks and risky-operation reviews.
